case_title: CALLAHAN, DAVID et al vs. HOLDER, GARETH JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALLAHAN, DAVID BARRAK, GRACE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDER, GARETH JOHN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-12-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-11-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-22-1999
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-16-1999 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALLAHAN, DAVID BARRAK, GRACE SERVED JAN-13-1999, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDER, GARETH JOHN

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-12-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY RAUL A RAY. HEARING SET FOR APR-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-21-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-21-1999, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SACTION AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL RAUL A. RAY, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-06-1999 CONTINUED FROM APR-21-1999 TO JUN-02-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CALLAHAN, DAVID BARRAK, GRACE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS
